query:
INSERT INTO release_notes (id, version, title, content, createdAt)
VALUES (
  FLOOR(RAND() * 900000) + 100000,
  CONCAT('patch-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-fixes'),
  'Lives Restored + App Fixes',
  '**Warden Dispatch — Day 14**

A system error caused some of you to lose a life unfairly on Day 13. We found it, we fixed it.

**Lives restored:**
- Chess → back to 3 lives
- CTM → back to 4 lives
- Nat → back to 4 lives

The Day 13 penalties have been cleared. No £25 requests are outstanding for these days.

**What else was fixed:**
- The Save Progress button was cutting off on some phones — it now sits properly above the nav bar
- A force-refresh button has been added to My Day so you can manually sync if your data looks stale
- An error logging system is now running in the background to catch issues before they affect you

If you see anything wrong, hit the Report Issue button on your screen and it comes straight to us.

Keep going. The challenge continues.',
  NOW()
);
